title: On the Daimonion of Socrates
description: Plutarch explores the nature of Socrates' inner divine voice — what was it? A god? A daemon? Pure intuition?
introduction: Plutarch explores the nature of Socrates' inner divine voice — what was it? A god? A daemon? Pure intuition?

translation.text: Socrates' sign was not a voice but a kind of contact, a wordless touch of intelligence upon his mind.
